full_text:
Que Xuan 闕宣
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Que Xuan (闕宣)was born in Xiapi. With Tao Qian’s support, declared himself Son of Heaven but was later killed by Tao Qian. Que Xuan was affiliated with Tao Qian. Que Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
